COURT TRIAL CONTINUED, WITH SAME APPEARANCE PRESENT. DEFT.'S WITNESSES CALLED AND SWORN. DEFT.'S REST THEIR CASE. THEIR IS NO REBUTTAL EVIDENCE BY PLT, CLOSING ARGUMENTS, DEFTS. DO NOT HAVE FURTHER ARGUMENT MS. BELL GIVES HER CLOSING ARGUMENTS ON REBUTTAL. THERE BEING NO MORE ARGUMENTS NOR EVIDENCE, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO THURS. JULY 24, AT 10AM, WHEN THE DECISION WILL BE ANNOUNCED BY THE COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORTON, URSALINE JACKSON, RODNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 224 MORELAND STREET, S.F. $1,064.08 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,064.08, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTY FEES AND COSTS PER MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND MOTION TO TAX COSTS. PURS TO STIP IN OPEN COURT PLTF SHALL PAY DEFT URSALINE MORTON $2,176- REIMBURSING THE COSTS FOR REPLACING THE KITCHEN FLOOR. PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE ON DATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES IS RETURNED TO THE PLAINTIFF.
